详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "Features: 1. Dual power supply-when powered by only 3 AAA batteries (not included), this clock will automatically work in energy-saving mode. When the power saving mode is turned on, the LED will automatically turn off 15 seconds after your last operation, and you can wake up by just tapping, tapping or clapping your hands. If you want the led to stay lit, please plug in the power cord ((included)) and use a 5V/1A USB adapter (not included) to power it. 2. alarm and snooze-long press \"alarm\" to set the alarm time and snooze time. Use \"up\" and \"down\" to adjust the hours and minutes. The snooze time ranges from 1 minute to 60 minutes each time, 3 times in total. Easy to read-the digital alarm clock in the bedroom has a large number of LEDs, and the brightness of the display can be easily adjusted according to personal preference. Support 12 and 24 hour clock. To save time and avoid setting all parameters after unplugging the power cord, please install a battery. 3. adjustable brightness-if you find that the LED is too bright at night, you can use the \"up\" button to adjust it to low level, long press the light button to turn off the LED, or unplug the power cord to make the clock work in energy-saving mode. 4. simple design-the digital alarm clock has a pure black casing and a clear LED display. This led clock is an ideal gift for everyone. Product Name: led mirror alarm clock Material: ABS plastic + electronic components Style: simple and modern Size: 16.8*4*7.2cm Power supply mode: AAA battery * 3, or use USB to plug in Special attention: this product is a LED light, it is recommended to plug in and use it, and it cannot be on for a long time when the battery is installed. Packing List: Mirror alarm clock * 1, USB cable * 1 Note: Without battery. It is always on when plugged in (it will always be on, it will not automatically turn off), but it cannot be always on when the battery is installed (voice-activated bright screen, memory time) Adjust the time: 1. in the display time interface, press and hold the mode button for three seconds, and then enter the setting. First adjust the 12-hour or 24-hour system, and then press the mode button briefly to confirm. In the display date interface, press the mode key to start adjusting the year, month, and day, and short-circuit the mode key every time you confirm. Up is up, do is down. 2. Press and hold the Al button on the alarm clock, and then it will start to ring for 1-5 days, or 1-6 days, or 1-7 days, and then the alarm time will be automatically saved if it does not move for 10 seconds 3. when the temperature interface is displayed, long press the mode button, and a beep is heard, that is to switch to display only the time # Clock # digital clock"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-live-01.slatic.net/p/4e72dd0d3780e991e0ff9606499db976.jpg"}]

Features:

1. Dual power supply-when powered by only 3 AAA batteries (not included), this clock will automatically work in energy-saving mode. When the power saving mode is turned on, the LED will automatically turn off 15 seconds after your last operation, and you can wake up by just tapping, tapping or clapping your hands. If you want the led to stay lit, please plug in the power cord ((included)) and use a 5V/1A USB adapter (not included) to power it.

2. alarm and snooze-long press "alarm" to set the alarm time and snooze time. Use "up" and "down" to adjust the hours and minutes. The snooze time ranges from 1 minute to 60 minutes each time, 3 times in total.

Easy to read-the digital alarm clock in the bedroom has a large number of LEDs, and the brightness of the display can be easily adjusted according to personal preference. Support 12 and 24 hour clock. To save time and avoid setting all parameters after unplugging the power cord, please install a battery.

3. adjustable brightness-if you find that the LED is too bright at night, you can use the "up" button to adjust it to low level, long press the light button to turn off the LED, or unplug the power cord to make the clock work in energy-saving mode.

4. simple design-the digital alarm clock has a pure black casing and a clear LED display. This led clock is an ideal gift for everyone.

Product Name: led mirror alarm clock

Material: ABS plastic + electronic components

Style: simple and modern

Size: 16.8*4*7.2cm

Power supply mode: AAA battery * 3, or use USB to plug in

Special attention: this product is a LED light, it is recommended to plug in and use it, and it cannot be on for a long time when the battery is installed.

Packing List: Mirror alarm clock * 1, USB cable * 1

Note: Without battery. It is always on when plugged in (it will always be on, it will not automatically turn off), but it cannot be always on when the battery is installed (voice-activated bright screen, memory time)

Adjust the time:

1. in the display time interface, press and hold the mode button for three seconds, and then enter the setting.

First adjust the 12-hour or 24-hour system, and then press the mode button briefly to confirm.

In the display date interface, press the mode key to start adjusting the year, month, and day, and short-circuit the mode key every time you confirm. Up is up, do is down.

2. Press and hold the Al button on the alarm clock, and then it will start to ring for 1-5 days, or 1-6 days, or 1-7 days, and then the alarm time will be automatically saved if it does not move for 10 seconds

3. when the temperature interface is displayed, long press the mode button, and a beep is heard, that is to switch to display only the time
